name: Document Vault

shells.sidebar-main: Folder tree sidebar with main content area for document browsing and viewing

description: Secure document repository for deal rooms with watermarked viewing, granular access audit, and inline Q&A threads. Provides due-diligence document management with full audit trail.

page_briefs.documents: Document list page with a filter bar at top for document type, folder, access level, upload date, and keyword search. Below, a list-mode file browser displays folders and documents with columns for name, size, uploaded-by, last-viewed, and watermark status. Right-click context actions include download request, share, and view audit log.
page_briefs.document-view: Secure document viewer fills the main canvas with dynamic watermark overlay showing viewer identity and timestamp, disabled download or print where gated, and a page navigator. A collapsible Q&A thread sidebar docks on the right allowing viewers to pose questions anchored to specific pages or passages, with assigned responders and status.
